---
id: get-recertification-extract
title: "Periodic access-review (recertification) extract"
description: "Per user: FUNCTIONAL/DATA group memberships, effective entitlements (including DS T10 wall-crossing USER grants), expiring/expired grants, and SoD violations (DS T11). Returns JSON by default; pass format=csv or Accept: text/csv for a CSV export (one row per user, multi-valued fields flattened to semicolon-separated summaries)."
sidebar_label: "Periodic access-review (recertification) extract"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Periodic access-review (recertification) extract"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/admin/recertification"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Per user: FUNCTIONAL/DATA group memberships, effective entitlements (including DS T10 wall-crossing USER grants), expiring/expired grants, and SoD violations (DS T11). Returns JSON by default; pass format=csv or Accept: text/csv for a CSV export (one row per user, multi-valued fields flattened to semicolon-separated summaries).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
